component.name: QMediaCenter
component.summary: IPTV, Emby, Plex and local media in one Qt6 interface

description.p: QMediaCenter is a lightweight, open-source media center built with Qt6 (PySide6) and libmpv. It brings together IPTV (Xtream Codes), Emby, Plex, and your local media library in one unified interface.

ul.li: IPTV (Xtream Codes) — Live TV, Movies and Series with category browsing and full-catalog search
Emby and Plex — browse and play server libraries with auto user detection
Local and network library — scan folders for video, music and photos enriched with posters
Hardware decoding — VAAPI on Linux (Intel, AMD); HEVC, AV1, H.264, AC-3, DTS
Continue Watching — resume positions saved across all sources
Home screen — rows for Continue Watching, Favourites, Recently Added
KDE Breeze Light theme with desktop accent colour

screenshot.caption: IPTV — Live TV, Movies and Series

description.p: Disk-cached IPTV stream list, scroll pagination for recently added, background auto-refresh.
